Case Study · UI/UX Design . development

Reddington Hospital

Healthcare Website — Patient Booking & Digital Experience

Overview

Reddington Hospital is a leading private healthcare provider in Lagos, Nigeria. The goal was to design a modern, trustworthy digital experience that makes it easy for patients to find services, book appointments, and access care — all on any device.

The Problem

Patients struggled to find the right specialist, navigate services, and book appointments online. The existing digital presence lacked structure, trust signals, and mobile responsiveness.

The Solution

Designed a clean, professional landing page with a symptom checker, streamlined booking form, clear specialization tags, and trust-building stats — all optimized for mobile and desktop.

Key Features Designed
📅 Appointment Booking Form
🔍 Symptom Checker Tool
🏥 Specializations Directory
📊 Trust Stats Bar
📱 Fully Responsive
🎨 Brand-aligned UI
Tools Used
FigmaHTML/CSSUser ResearchWireframingPrototyping
Outcome
↑ 40% Appointment conversions
↑ 60% Mobile engagement
100% Client satisfaction
Reddington Hospital — Live Preview
